title: DSS Submission Message Attributes Specification
description: Schema to validate submission message attributes

StringValue.description: A unique ID created by the submitting application that will allow said application to match the result information to each submitted package, e.g. 'etd_123123' or '98765'. This system is agnostic about the value of the ID.
Name of the submitting system, e.g. 'ETD'. Should be consistent for each submitting system (should not change over time
Name of the pre-agreed upon output SQS queue to be used for the submitting system. The queue must already exist and both systems must have appropriate access to the queue.
